[爱慕]这本书超好看，看了还想看。继续努力。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763543381,"group_id":"7554045076452674585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzuQUZyCYCYnYt6dL1GS5wQRlgXbbB6WVkp/sfbsFac0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"4217362721544331","user_name":"喜欢败毒草的黄级"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4217362721544331","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7554045076452674585","book_info":{"abstract":"【钓鱼】＋【系统】＋【美女房东】+【逆袭】+【直播】
向南失业三个月，不敢让家人知道。
人到中年，没房、没车、没存款，还倒欠银行几十万。
催收公司频繁骚扰，儿子读书没学位，前妻抢夺抚养权，美女房东上门催租.....
直到冰冷提示音响起：
【万物皆可钓系统已绑定】
从此画风巨变。
向南从开始的钓鱼赚钱，
到最后钓上的东西千奇百怪，
狗头金、古董、作案工具、贪污证据、国之重器......
从一人垂钓，
到他直播带领全国钓友探钓999个野钓地点。
每一次抛竿，
都充满惊喜！
每一次抛竿，
都牵动着所有人的心。
从此，向南的鱼竿成为他登顶的利剑！
谁还敢说他钓鱼玩物丧志？！
谁还不知道向南是钓鱼届的唯一传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d97d6e71df998533b24d6bb073e41de6","author":"画加沙","author_id":"","book_id":"7554045076452674585","book_name":"失业后钓鱼还债，怎么就成首富了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7886人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7554045773785088537","read_count":"7886","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"687693"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"311","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,直播,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/82f74b47f153a35d143e27bf2a284bbd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309081&x-signature=oH7emwohXJfqcSx%2F3J%2Fp5xxEeos%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1021865547814220","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043121736CBF334940D425A5B7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration
